input.subject: Economic history and present-day crisis parallels
input.fixed_hooks: IMF World Economic Outlook mid-April, major debt conference late May

test_cases.output_summary: 8-edition plan with coherent narrative arc. Overview establishes thematic logic. Each edition has working title, specific angle, format note, and production flag. Timely peg edition (IMF Outlook) flagged for turnaround constraint. Two entry-point editions identified. Final edition timed to conference. Production flags honest and specific.

input.subject: Independent food and hospitality business
input.fixed_hooks: Restaurant sector slow season, annual trade show in February
input.ambition: Range across the hospitality landscape in the slow season when operators have time to think

test_cases.output_summary: 6-edition plan framing January-February as a 'planning season' arc. Overview uses hospitality-industry logic. Each edition is independently strong but builds cumulative picture. Trade show edition identified as timely anchor. Character-led edition on supplier relationships included for texture. Production flags realistic for reported newsletter.

input.subject: Small-scale farming — growing and business
input.fixed_hooks: Last frost dates (variable by region), spring market season opening
saved_topics: soil temperature vs calendar planting dates
input.ambition: Practical planting-season arc — build from soil prep through to first sales

test_cases.output_summary: 12-edition seasonal arc following natural farming progression. Overview frames the planting-to-market narrative logic clearly. Editions move logically from soil prep to planting decisions to sales strategy. Four 'evergreen' editions identified as strong share/promotion pieces. Production flags note which editions need regional data sourcing. Recurring 'reader question' format introduced at Edition 4.
